taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Data Mining, Information Retrieval, Natural Language Processing, Software Design
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Data Mining:1.0, Information Retrieval:1.0, Natural Language Processing:1.0, Software Design:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related technical field or equivalent technical experience, 1+ years experience with machine learning, data mining, and information retrieval or natural language processing, 1+ year of industry experience in software design, development, and algorithm related solutions, 1+ years experience in programming languages such as Java, Python, etc
preferred_quals: 1+ years of relevant work experience, MS or PhD in Computer Science or related technical discipline, Experience developing large scale systems, Knowledge of recommendation systems, Ability to diagnose technical problems, debug code, and automate routine tasks, Analytical approach coupled with solid communication skills and a sense of ownership
core_responsibilities: Building and deploying relevance models that power our various recommender systems and personalized intent engines, Keeping scalability and performance in mind through your design and engineering choices, You will explore novel approaches for machine learning ranking and modeling downstream impact, as well as new ways of creating new product features by leveraging the cutting edge machine learning techniques in Generative AI, NLP, You will work with big data and analyze tracking data to understand member preferences and identify opportunities for taking the products you work on to the next level, You will work directly with partner data science, product, and infrastructure teams to take your ideas from conception to production
job_summary: LinkedIn is the world’s largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. The role involves developing and implementing machine learning models and algorithms, focusing on building and deploying relevance models for recommender systems and personalized intent engines.
